name: Coffee Cake (Judy Pollack)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, vanilla extract, lemon extract, sugar, eggs, and salad oil in a large bowl. Mix until well combined.
2. Stir in the sour cream and cinnamon. Mix until smooth.
3. Pour half of the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
4. Sprinkle the remaining brown sugar mixture (brown sugar mixed with cinnamon) over the batter in the pan.
5. Swirl the batter and sprinkle the remaining brown sugar mixture around the cake.
6. Add the remaining batter to the pan and swirl it again, then sprinkle the final layer of brown sugar mixture on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan. Serve and enjoy!
